mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM notice
writer like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
title like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
content like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE notice set hit=hit+1 WHERE num=#{num}
mapper.select: SELECT nnum, ntitle, nwriter, NCONTENT, nhit, ndate FROM notice WHERE num=#{num}
